title: Abundance
description: Adds a rocket launcher, leaf blower and the ability to throw some stuff.
body:
# Abundance

Adds an 'abundance' of features (3)

## Features
- You can throw things!
  - Right click while holding one of the items I've chosen to be throwable:
    - Falling blocks (sand, dragon egg)
    - Slime and honey blocks
    - String and redstone
    - Chains, lanterns, iron bars, glass panes
    - End rods, lightning rods
    - Torches, Candles
    - Fences, Walls
    - Pressure plates
    - Plants, mushrooms
    - Signs, rails, and carpets.
- Leafblower!
  - Crafted as shown in the gallery
  - Right click to clear out leaf litters, flowers, etc, and it will be sucked into your inventory
- Rocket launcher!
  - Crafted as shown in the gallery
  - Right click to shoot a rocket from your inventory, like a crossbow would but without any long reloading
